style.name: Fauvist global newsroom
style.description: High-saturation Fauvist news posters with expressive brush color, bold contrast, fixed Xiazi and Doudoulong IP characters, and consistent bilingual layout.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 挪威、英格兰、西班牙晋级世界杯八强，伊朗举行最高领袖葬礼，俄乌与北约同时升温
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界不是突然变乱，而是旧秩序正在同时接受压力测试
zh-CN.headlineFull: 挪威、英格兰、西班牙晋级世界杯八强，伊朗举行最高领袖葬礼，俄乌与北约同时升温；世界不是突然变乱，而是旧秩序正在同时接受压力测试。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯淘汰赛继续爆冷：挪威2:1淘汰巴西，英格兰3:2击败东道主墨西哥，西班牙1:0绝杀葡萄牙。球场外，德黑兰举行哈梅内伊葬礼，俄罗斯对乌克兰发动新一轮导弹和无人机袭击，北约峰会前防务开支压力上升，超强台风Bavi横扫西太平洋，美国犹他州AI续方项目引发医疗监管争议，美股AI芯片股反弹，OPEC+决定继续小幅增产。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的关键词不是“新闻很多”，而是“系统承压”：足球、战争、气候、AI、能源和资本市场，都在测试各自的韧性。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 一天看懂这8件事，就能感觉到：世界不是一条线在变化，而是很多条线一起在拧紧。

en-US.headlineFact: In the past 24 hours, Norway, England and Spain moved into the World Cup quarter-finals
en-US.headlineView: old systems are being stress-tested at once
en-US.headlineFull: In the past 24 hours, Norway, England and Spain moved into the World Cup quarter-finals; old systems are being stress-tested at once.
en-US.intro: In the past 24 hours, Norway, England and Spain moved into the World Cup quarter-finals. Beyond football, Iran held Khamenei’s funeral procession, Russia launched new missile and drone attacks on Ukraine, NATO entered another spending-pressure moment, Super Typhoon Bavi battered the western Pacific, Utah’s AI prescription-refill pilot sparked medical concerns, AI chip stocks lifted Wall Street, and OPEC+ agreed to raise output modestly.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 今天的关键词不是“新闻很多”，而是“系统承压”：足球、战争、气候、AI、能源和资本市场，都在测试各自的韧性。
en-US.doudouQuote: 一天看懂这8件事，就能感觉到：世界不是一条线在变化，而是很多条线一起在拧紧。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 挪威淘汰巴西，英格兰送走墨西哥，西班牙绝杀葡萄牙
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛真正残酷的地方，是没有球队只凭历史就能继续前进
zh-CN.headlineFull: 挪威淘汰巴西，英格兰送走墨西哥，西班牙绝杀葡萄牙；淘汰赛真正残酷的地方，是没有球队只凭历史就能继续前进。
zh-CN.intro:
北京时间2026年7月6日05:00至7月7日05:00，世界杯共完成3场淘汰赛赛果：

巴西 1:2 挪威

墨西哥 2:3 英格兰

葡萄牙 0:1 西班牙

挪威凭借哈兰德的关键进球爆冷淘汰五冠王巴西，首次进入世界杯八强；英格兰在墨西哥城3:2击败东道主墨西哥，晋级后将对阵挪威；西班牙则在达拉斯1:0击败葡萄牙，梅里诺补时阶段打入制胜球。美国对比利时的比赛在北京时间07:07 08:00开球，不计入本期05:00统计窗口。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛最真实：名字再大，也要在90分钟里重新证明自己。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 巴西出局、墨西哥出局、葡萄牙出局，这一天球迷心脏真的很忙。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：世界杯日报。

en-US.headlineFact: From 05:00 on July 6 to 05:00 on July 7 Beijing time, three World Cup knockout results were confirmed: Brazil 1–2 Norway, Mexico 2–3 England, and Portugal 0–1 Spain
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: From 05:00 on July 6 to 05:00 on July 7 Beijing time, three World Cup knockout results were confirmed: Brazil 1–2 Norway, Mexico 2–3 England, and Portugal 0–1 Spain; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: From 05:00 on July 6 to 05:00 on July 7 Beijing time, three World Cup knockout results were confirmed: Brazil 1–2 Norway, Mexico 2–3 England, and Portugal 0–1 Spain. Norway stunned Brazil to reach their first World Cup quarter-final, England survived a thriller against Mexico, and Spain edged Portugal with a stoppage-time winner.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛最真实：名字再大，也要在90分钟里重新证明自己。
en-US.doudouQuote: 巴西出局、墨西哥出局、葡萄牙出局，这一天球迷心脏真的很忙。

sources.title: Reuters World Cup、The Guardian live coverage、FIFA Match Centre

zh-CN.headlineFact: 德黑兰举行哈梅内伊葬礼
zh-CN.headlineView: 一个时代的结束，往往也是权力交接和社会情绪重新聚集的开始
zh-CN.headlineFull: 德黑兰举行哈梅内伊葬礼；一个时代的结束，往往也是权力交接和社会情绪重新聚集的开始。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊的葬礼队伍在德黑兰举行，大批民众聚集送别。报道画面显示，载有灵柩的车辆穿过人群，葬礼也同时成为伊朗国内政治情绪与对外冲突记忆的集中表达。中东局势接下来不仅取决于谁接任，更取决于新权力结构如何处理与美国、以色列及地区盟友的关系。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 葬礼是一个时代的句号，但真正影响世界的，是句号后面谁来写下一段。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 大事件不只看现场有多少人，还要看后面谁能接住这个局。

en-US.headlineFact: A funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei drew large crowds in Tehran
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: A funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei drew large crowds in Tehran; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: A funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei drew large crowds in Tehran. Beyond the ceremony itself, the event marks a sensitive moment of political transition, public emotion and regional uncertainty. What comes next depends not only on succession, but on how Iran’s next power structure handles relations with the U.S., Israel and regional actors.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 葬礼是一个时代的句号，但真正影响世界的，是句号后面谁来写下一段。
en-US.doudouQuote: 大事件不只看现场有多少人，还要看后面谁能接住这个局。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 俄罗斯导弹和无人机袭击乌克兰造成至少22人死亡
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争的长期化，正在把城市生活变成持续的心理与基础设施消耗
zh-CN.headlineFull: 俄罗斯导弹和无人机袭击乌克兰造成至少22人死亡；战争的长期化，正在把城市生活变成持续的心理与基础设施消耗。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，俄罗斯对乌克兰发动新一轮导弹和无人机袭击，造成至少22人死亡，其中基辅及周边地区受创严重。袭击发生前，泽连斯基曾警告俄罗斯可能准备发动更大规模攻击。连续袭击不仅造成伤亡，也继续压迫乌克兰的防空系统、城市修复能力和民众日常生活。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 战争最可怕的不是某一次爆炸，而是它让普通人的“正常生活”越来越难回来。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 每一次袭击都是新闻数字，但对城市来说，是路、电、水和睡眠一起被打断。

en-US.headlineFact: Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine killed at least 22 people, with Kyiv and the surrounding region heavily affected
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine killed at least 22 people, with Kyiv and the surrounding region heavily affected; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine killed at least 22 people, with Kyiv and the surrounding region heavily affected. The strikes came after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy warned that Russia might be preparing a larger assault. Beyond the immediate casualties, the attacks continue to strain Ukraine’s air defenses, infrastructure and civilian resilience.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 战争最可怕的不是某一次爆炸，而是它让普通人的“正常生活”越来越难回来。
en-US.doudouQuote: 每一次袭击都是新闻数字，但对城市来说，是路、电、水和睡眠一起被打断。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 北约峰会前美国要求盟友兑现防务开支承诺
zh-CN.headlineView: 联盟真正的考验，不是共同声明，而是每个国家愿意付出多少真实成本
zh-CN.headlineFull: 北约峰会前美国要求盟友兑现防务开支承诺；联盟真正的考验，不是共同声明，而是每个国家愿意付出多少真实成本。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，美国总统特朗普将前往土耳其安卡拉参加北约峰会，重点推动盟友落实更高防务支出承诺。北约秘书长吕特也要求成员国拿出可信计划，说明如何达到目标。俄乌战争、中东局势和欧洲安全焦虑叠加，让北约内部的“承诺”正在被要求转化为预算、军工产能和实际部署能力。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 安全感不是开会开出来的，最后一定会落到钱、装备和执行力上。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 盟友关系最现实的一刻：一起喊口号容易，一起掏预算很难。

en-US.headlineFact: Ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara, the U
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: Ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara, the U; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: Ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara, the U.S. is pressing allies to turn defense-spending promises into concrete plans. NATO chief Mark Rutte is also demanding credible pathways to meet spending targets. With Ukraine, the Middle East and European security concerns all in play, alliance unity is increasingly being measured in budgets, industrial capacity and deployable forces.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 安全感不是开会开出来的，最后一定会落到钱、装备和执行力上。
en-US.doudouQuote: 盟友关系最现实的一刻：一起喊口号容易，一起掏预算很难。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 超强台风Bavi横扫马里亚纳群岛，中国南方洪水已造成伤亡
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候风险正在从自然灾害，变成区域经济和安全系统的压力测试
zh-CN.headlineFull: 超强台风Bavi横扫马里亚纳群岛，中国南方洪水已造成伤亡；气候风险正在从自然灾害，变成区域经济和安全系统的压力测试。
zh-CN.intro: Reuters报道，超强台风Bavi以五级风暴强度袭击西太平洋马里亚纳群岛，Rota、Guam、Tinian和Saipan等地面临极端强风和暴雨威胁。与此同时，受台风Maysak影响，中国广西南宁发生洪水并造成2人死亡，约5.5万人受影响；中国东部还在为Bavi可能带来的强风和暴雨做准备。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 极端天气不再只是“天灾”，它正在测试城市、电网、港口、基地和供应链。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 台风不是只吹一座岛，它会一路吹到能源、物流和保险账本里。

en-US.headlineFact: Super Typhoon Bavi battered the Mariana Islands with catastrophic winds and heavy rain, while flooding linked to Typhoon Maysak killed two people in Nanning, China, and affected around 55,000 residents
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: Super Typhoon Bavi battered the Mariana Islands with catastrophic winds and heavy rain, while flooding linked to Typhoon Maysak killed two people in Nanning, China, and affected around 55,000 residents; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: Super Typhoon Bavi battered the Mariana Islands with catastrophic winds and heavy rain, while flooding linked to Typhoon Maysak killed two people in Nanning, China, and affected around 55,000 residents. Eastern China is also preparing for Bavi’s next impacts. Extreme weather is increasingly becoming an economic, infrastructure and security stress test.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 极端天气不再只是“天灾”，它正在测试城市、电网、港口、基地和供应链。
en-US.doudouQuote: 台风不是只吹一座岛，它会一路吹到能源、物流和保险账本里。

zh-CN.headlineFact: 犹他州允许AI续开部分处方，医生和监管者提出警惕
zh-CN.headlineView: AI进入医疗的关键，不是能不能省时间，而是谁为风险负责
zh-CN.headlineFull: 犹他州允许AI续开部分处方，医生和监管者提出警惕；AI进入医疗的关键，不是能不能省时间，而是谁为风险负责。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，美国犹他州一个AI续方项目允许居民通过名为Doctronic的AI聊天机器人在线续开部分处方。该项目借助州内“监管沙盒”启动，人类医生目前会审核订单，但项目计划逐步走向更自动化。医生、律师和公共卫生专家担心，药物续方并非简单流程，患者病情变化、药物相互作用和监管责任都需要明确边界。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 医疗AI最难的不是“回答得像医生”，而是出问题时谁来承担责任。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 续方看起来很小，但它可能是AI拿到“医疗钥匙”的第一扇门。

en-US.headlineFact: Utah’s AI prescription-refill pilot allows residents to renew some prescriptions online through an AI chatbot called Doctronic
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: Utah’s AI prescription-refill pilot allows residents to renew some prescriptions online through an AI chatbot called Doctronic; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: Utah’s AI prescription-refill pilot allows residents to renew some prescriptions online through an AI chatbot called Doctronic. The program launched through a regulatory sandbox, with doctors currently reviewing orders, but it raises major questions about safety, accountability, drug interactions and whether AI should be allowed to perform tasks previously reserved for licensed clinicians.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 医疗AI最难的不是“回答得像医生”，而是出问题时谁来承担责任。
en-US.doudouQuote: 续方看起来很小，但它可能是AI拿到“医疗钥匙”的第一扇门。

zh-CN.headlineFact: AI芯片股推动美股反弹，微软却同步宣布裁员
zh-CN.headlineView: 资本市场正在同时奖励AI想象力，也审视AI成本
zh-CN.headlineFull: AI芯片股推动美股反弹，微软却同步宣布裁员；资本市场正在同时奖励AI想象力，也审视AI成本。
zh-CN.intro: Reuters报道，7月6日美股收高，S&P 500上涨0.72%，纳斯达克上涨1.12%，科技和半导体板块表现突出。Broadcom因与Apple延长定制芯片供应协议至2031年上涨，半导体指数反弹；但微软宣布裁员约4800人，股价下跌。市场正在押注AI相关企业的二季度盈利，同时也开始追问巨额AI资本开支能否真正带来回报。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI行情已经进入第二阶段：不只看愿景，还要看利润、现金流和效率。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 市场一边给AI芯片鼓掌，一边盯着大公司有没有把钱花明白。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：AI与资本市场。

en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: U; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: U.S. stocks rose on July 6, led by technology and semiconductor names. Broadcom gained after extending a custom-chip supply deal with Apple through 2031, while Microsoft fell after announcing about 4,800 job cuts. Investors are betting on strong AI-driven earnings, but they are also asking whether massive AI capital spending can translate into real returns.
en-US.xiaziQuote: AI行情已经进入第二阶段：不只看愿景，还要看利润、现金流和效率。
en-US.doudouQuote: 市场一边给AI芯片鼓掌，一边盯着大公司有没有把钱花明白。

zh-CN.headlineView: 油价真正敏感的，不只是供给数字，而是中东风险和全球需求的共同预期
zh-CN.headlineFull: OPEC+七国同意8月小幅增产；油价真正敏感的，不只是供给数字，而是中东风险和全球需求的共同预期。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，OPEC+联盟中7个国家同意在8月合计增加18.8万桶/日的石油产量。这是OPEC+连续第五个月提高产量，参与国包括沙特、俄罗斯、伊拉克、科威特、哈萨克斯坦、阿尔及利亚和阿曼。决定公布时，燃油价格已从美以与伊朗战争期间的高位回落，市场正在重新评估供应、霍尔木兹安全和全球需求前景。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 原油市场从来不只看产量，还看风险溢价、航道安全和全球增长预期。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 多一点油，不一定就少一点焦虑；能源市场最怕的是“不确定”。

en-US.headlineFact: Seven OPEC+ countries agreed to raise oil output by a combined 188,000 barrels per day in August
en-US.headlineView: the real test is cost, resilience and accountability
en-US.headlineFull: Seven OPEC+ countries agreed to raise oil output by a combined 188,000 barrels per day in August; the real test is cost, resilience and accountability.
en-US.intro: Seven OPEC+ countries agreed to raise oil output by a combined 188,000 barrels per day in August. It is the fifth consecutive monthly increase, involving Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria and Oman. The decision comes as fuel prices retreat from wartime highs and markets reassess supply, Hormuz security and global demand.
en-US.xiaziQuote: 原油市场从来不只看产量，还看风险溢价、航道安全和全球增长预期。
en-US.doudouQuote: 多一点油，不一定就少一点焦虑；能源市场最怕的是“不确定”。
